name: Tahoe Truckee Jerky
self_description: Tim and I have both lived in Tahoe/Truckee area for nearly 35 years, meeting in Tahoe City in the summer of 1991 and working in the local restaurant businesses before moving to Truckee and opening Zano's. 15 years ago we partnered with a local plant and trademarked our Tahoe Truckee Local Craft Jerky brand.

name: Adele's Attic
self_description: Adele's Attic specializes in both hand-selected luxury vintage and pre-loved designer clothing and accessories. This is a unique shopping experience for those who value wearable art through fashion while highlighting sustainability.

name: Valhalla Vintage
self_description: Valhalla was established in 2017 followed by our Brick & Mortar vintage shop which came to Truckee, California in 2022. Our shop features Americana heritage brands, timeless classics and one of a kind pieces from years of collecting.
